sourceCollection.name: Englishphile Trios Pack 001
sourceCollection.copyrightNote: Original Englishphile pilot content generated for internal educational use; not copied verbatim from uploaded worksheets or third-party books.

problems.title: Trios / Gapped Sentences Set 01
problems.statement: Mỗi câu hỏi gồm ba câu có cùng một từ bị khuyết.
problems.instructions: Điền một từ phù hợp với cả ba câu. Chú ý collocation và nghĩa khác nhau của cùng một từ.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The committee will _____ the proposal next week.
2. You should _____ all the evidence before reaching a conclusion.
3. I would never _____ such an irresponsible suggestion.

sentences: The committee will _____ the proposal next week.
You should _____ all the evidence before reaching a conclusion.
I would never _____ such an irresponsible suggestion.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The policy was introduced to _____ economic growth.
2. A good teacher knows how to _____ curiosity.
3. The article helped _____ a lively debate.

sentences: The policy was introduced to _____ economic growth.
A good teacher knows how to _____ curiosity.
The article helped _____ a lively debate.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The final paragraph should _____ the main argument.
2. The new law will _____ existing regulations.
3. Extra examples can _____ rather than replace analysis.

sentences: The final paragraph should _____ the main argument.
The new law will _____ existing regulations.
Extra examples can _____ rather than replace analysis.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The witness tried to _____ the facts.
2. The fog began to _____ the outline of the hills.
3. Technical terms can _____ meaning if used carelessly.

sentences: The witness tried to _____ the facts.
The fog began to _____ the outline of the hills.
Technical terms can _____ meaning if used carelessly.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The writer uses contrast to _____ the weakness of the claim.
2. The report will _____ several areas for improvement.
3. The bright colour helps _____ the key information.

sentences: The writer uses contrast to _____ the weakness of the claim.
The report will _____ several areas for improvement.
The bright colour helps _____ the key information.

problems.title: Trios / Gapped Sentences Set 02
problems.statement: Mỗi câu hỏi gồm ba câu có cùng một từ bị khuyết.
problems.instructions: Điền một từ phù hợp với cả ba câu. Chú ý collocation và nghĩa khác nhau của cùng một từ.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The school decided to _____ the new timetable in September.
2. The charity hopes to _____ a reading programme.
3. The company will _____ stricter security measures.

sentences: The school decided to _____ the new timetable in September.
The charity hopes to _____ a reading programme.
The company will _____ stricter security measures.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. His answer failed to _____ the main issue.
2. The article will _____ the relationship between sleep and memory.
3. The teacher asked us to _____ the question directly.

sentences: His answer failed to _____ the main issue.
The article will _____ the relationship between sleep and memory.
The teacher asked us to _____ the question directly.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The editor asked her to _____ the introduction.
2. We need to _____ our strategy after the poor results.
3. The student promised to _____ the essay before submitting it.

sentences: The editor asked her to _____ the introduction.
We need to _____ our strategy after the poor results.
The student promised to _____ the essay before submitting it.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The rumour began to _____ quickly through the school.
2. The disease can _____ from one area to another.
3. Good ideas often _____ when students discuss them.

sentences: The rumour began to _____ quickly through the school.
The disease can _____ from one area to another.
Good ideas often _____ when students discuss them.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The article tries to _____ the causes of the problem.
2. Could you _____ why the answer is wrong?
3. The theory does not _____ every case.

sentences: The article tries to _____ the causes of the problem.
Could you _____ why the answer is wrong?
The theory does not _____ every case.

problems.title: Trios / Gapped Sentences Set 03
problems.statement: Mỗi câu hỏi gồm ba câu có cùng một từ bị khuyết.
problems.instructions: Điền một từ phù hợp với cả ba câu. Chú ý collocation và nghĩa khác nhau của cùng một từ.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The committee reached a _____ after two hours of debate.
2. Her sudden silence led me to the wrong _____.
3. The evidence points to only one _____.

sentences: The committee reached a _____ after two hours of debate.
Her sudden silence led me to the wrong _____.
The evidence points to only one _____.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The athlete managed to _____ her composure.
2. Students should _____ a record of recurring mistakes.
3. The school hopes to _____ high academic standards.

sentences: The athlete managed to _____ her composure.
Students should _____ a record of recurring mistakes.
The school hopes to _____ high academic standards.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The writer tone begins to _____ in the final paragraph.
2. Public attitudes may _____ over time.
3. You should _____ your focus from detail to inference.

sentences: The writer tone begins to _____ in the final paragraph.
Public attitudes may _____ over time.
You should _____ your focus from detail to inference.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The examples help to _____ the abstract idea.
2. The incident will _____ the need for better planning.
3. The diagram can _____ how the process works.

sentences: The examples help to _____ the abstract idea.
The incident will _____ the need for better planning.
The diagram can _____ how the process works.

questions.prompt: Điền một từ duy nhất phù hợp với cả ba câu.
questions.passage:
1. The article will _____ the issue from several angles.
2. The course aims to _____ all major exam skills.
3. The insurance does not _____ accidental damage.

sentences: The article will _____ the issue from several angles.
The course aims to _____ all major exam skills.
The insurance does not _____ accidental damage.
